query:
INSERT INTO timeline_events (title, event_date, summary, category, status, is_public, source_document, source_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES

-- ECF 5: Original Complaint filed
('Federal Civil Rights Complaint Filed (ECF 5)', '2025-01-06', 'Plaintiff Cameron Church files original civil rights complaint in U.S. District Court, D. Nev., Case No. 3:24-cv-00579-ART-CSD, alleging constitutional violations by Washoe County defendants arising from the state criminal case CR23-0657.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 5 — Complaint', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 9: Emergency Motion for TRO
('Emergency Motion for Temporary Restraining Order Filed (ECF 9)', '2025-01-06', 'Plaintiff files emergency motion for temporary restraining order seeking federal intervention in the ongoing state court proceedings.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 9 — Emergency Motion for TRO', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 11: Order Granting E-File
('Court Grants E-Filing Privileges (ECF 11)', '2025-01-08', 'District court grants plaintiff permission to file electronically, enabling direct access to the federal docket.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 11 — Order Granting E-File', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 12: Notice Regarding Intent
('Court Issues Notice Regarding Intent (ECF 12)', '2025-04-08', 'Court issues notice regarding intent — procedural notice in the federal civil rights case.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 12 — Notice Regarding Intent', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 13: Order After Arrest
('Federal Court Issues Order After State Court Arrest (ECF 13)', '2025-04-17', 'Federal district court issues order following plaintiff\'s arrest in the state case, acknowledging the intersection of the federal civil rights case and the ongoing state criminal proceedings.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 13 — Order After Arrest', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 14: Washoe County Defendants Motion to Dismiss
('Washoe County Defendants File Motion to Dismiss (ECF 14)', '2025-05-28', 'Washoe County defendants file motion to dismiss the federal civil rights complaint, raising jurisdictional and merits arguments.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 14 — Washoe County Defendants Motion to Dismiss', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 15: Minute Order in Chambers
('Minute Order Issued in Chambers (ECF 15)', '2025-05-29', 'District court issues minute order in chambers addressing case management matters.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 15 — Minute Order in Chambers', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 16: Civil Standing Order
('Civil Standing Order Issued (ECF 16)', '2025-05-29', 'Court issues civil standing order governing procedures for the case.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 16 — Civil Standing Order', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 17: Order Setting Case
('Order Setting Case Schedule Issued (ECF 17)', '2025-06-02', 'District court issues order setting case schedule and deadlines for the federal civil rights action.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 17 — Order Setting Case', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 18: Notice of Intent to Dismiss
('Court Issues Notice of Intent to Dismiss (ECF 18)', '2025-06-09', 'District court issues notice of intent to dismiss, signaling potential jurisdictional concerns under Rooker-Feldman or related doctrines.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 18 — Notice of Intent to Dismiss', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 19: Habeas Corpus Motion
('Plaintiff Files Habeas Corpus Motion (ECF 19)', '2025-07-25', 'Plaintiff files habeas corpus motion in federal court challenging the legality of pretrial detention in the state case.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 19 — Habeas Corpus Motion', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 20: Motion for Emergency Release
('Motion for Emergency Release Filed (ECF 20)', '2025-07-25', 'Plaintiff files motion for emergency release from pretrial detention, arguing continued custody violates constitutional rights.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 20 — Motion for Emergency Release', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 21: Motion for Laptop Access
('Motion for Laptop Access Filed (ECF 21)', '2025-07-25', 'Plaintiff files motion seeking access to laptop for legal research and case preparation while in pretrial detention.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 21 — Motion for Laptop Access', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 22: Notice to the Court
('Plaintiff Files Notice to the Court (ECF 22)', '2025-07-25', 'Plaintiff files notice to the court regarding case status and ongoing constitutional violations in the state proceedings.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 22 — Notice to the Court', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 23: Case Management Report
('Case Management Report Filed (ECF 23)', '2025-07-28', 'Case management report filed, documenting the status of the federal civil rights action and discovery posture.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 23 — Case Management Report', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 31: Motion to Stay Discovery by Defendants
('Defendants File Motion to Stay Discovery (ECF 31)', '2025-08-05', 'Washoe County defendants file motion to stay discovery pending resolution of their motion to dismiss.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 31 — Motion to Stay Discovery', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 32: Civil Standing Order (updated)
('Updated Civil Standing Order Issued (ECF 32)', '2025-08-06', 'Court issues updated civil standing order.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 32 — Civil Standing Order', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 33: Plaintiff Emergency Motion for Federal Oversight
('Plaintiff Files Emergency Motion for Federal Oversight (ECF 33)', '2025-08-11', 'Plaintiff files emergency motion for federal oversight of the state criminal proceedings, citing ongoing constitutional violations and bad faith conduct by state court actors.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 33 — Emergency Motion for Federal Oversight', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 34: Plaintiff Opposition to Motion to Dismiss
('Plaintiff Files Opposition to Motion to Dismiss (ECF 34)', '2025-08-11', 'Plaintiff files opposition to Washoe County defendants\' motion to dismiss, arguing the federal court has jurisdiction and the constitutional claims are cognizable.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 34 — Opposition to Motion to Dismiss', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 35: Statement on Retaliation and Bad Faith
('Plaintiff Files Statement on Retaliation and Bad Faith (ECF 35)', '2025-08-11', 'Plaintiff files statement documenting retaliation and bad faith conduct by state court actors in connection with the federal civil rights case.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 35 — Statement on Retaliation and Bad Faith', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 37: Exhibits / Evidentiary Pack
('Plaintiff Files Evidentiary Pack (ECF 37)', '2025-08-25', 'Plaintiff files comprehensive evidentiary pack as exhibits in support of the federal civil rights claims.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 37 — Evidentiary Pack', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 41: Notice of Appearance
('Notice of Appearance Filed (ECF 41)', '2025-09-16', 'Notice of appearance filed in the federal civil rights case.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 41 — Notice of Appearance', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 44: Response to ECF 42
('Response to Plaintiff\'s Evidentiary Filing (ECF 44)', '2025-12-04', 'Defendants file response to plaintiff\'s comprehensive evidentiary submission (ECF 42).', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 44 — Response to Evidentiary Filing', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 45: Judicial Notice of Evidentiary Packs
('Plaintiff Files Judicial Notice of Evidentiary Packs (ECF 45)', '2025-12-10', 'Plaintiff files judicial notice of evidentiary packs, unequal treatment documentation, and record of bad faith; requests written findings and clarification from the court.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 45 — Judicial Notice of Evidentiary Packs', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 46: Reply
('Plaintiff Files Reply Brief (ECF 46)', '2025-12-10', 'Plaintiff files reply brief in the federal civil rights action.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 46 — Reply Brief', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 47: Reply to ECF 43 (County Defendants Opposition)
('Plaintiff Files Reply to County Defendants\' Opposition (ECF 47)', '2025-12-12', 'Plaintiff files reply to county defendants\' opposition, continuing to press constitutional claims and documenting ongoing bad faith.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 47 — Reply to County Defendants Opposition', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),

-- ECF 49: Dismissed Without Prejudice
('Federal Case Dismissed Without Prejudice (ECF 49)', '2025-12-13', 'District court dismisses federal civil rights case without prejudice. Dismissal based on Rooker-Feldman jurisdictional bar. Plaintiff files Rule 59(e) motion to alter or amend judgment, tolling the appellate clock. Ninth Circuit appeal path preserved.', 'federal_case', 'confirmed', 1, 'ECF 49 — Dismissed Without Prejudice', NULL, NOW(), NOW());

logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 2: Unknown column 'is_public' in 'field list'
